subject: [PATCH v5 21/21] nfsd: add support to CB_NOTIFY for dir attribute changes

2026-05-22.patch_summary: This patch adds support to CB_NOTIFY for dir attribute changes in the NFS server. When a client requests notifications for directory attribute changes, the server will send these notifications alongside other events such as add/remove/rename operations. The server still recalls the delegation on a SETATTR operation, so these notifications are only sent for changes to child directories. The patch modifies two files: nfsd/nfs4state.c and fs/nfsd/nfs4xdr.c, adding new code to handle dir attribute change notifications.
